unit.comment: /*************************************************************************** * _ _ ____ _ * Project ___| | | | _ \| | * / __| | | | |_) | | * | (__| |_| | _ <| |___ * \___|\___/|_| \_\_____| * * Copyright (C) Daniel Stenberg, <daniel@haxx.se>, et al. * * This software is licensed as described in the file COPYING, which * you should have received as part of this distribution. The terms * are also available at https://curl.se/docs/copyright.html. * * You may opt to use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute and/or sell * copies of the Software, and permit persons to whom the Software is * furnished to do so, under the terms of the COPYING file. * * This software is distributed on an "AS IS" basis, WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY * KIND, either express or implied. * * SPDX-License-Identifier: curl * ***************************************************************************/
/* The last 3 #include files should be in this order */
unit.decl_stmt: static const char * const errors[]={ "", "Bad label", "Out of range", "Label loop", "Too small", "Out of memory", "RDATA length", "Malformat", "Bad RCODE", "Unexpected TYPE", "Unexpected CLASS", "No content", "Bad ID", "Name too long" };

function.name: doh_strerror
function.parameter_list: (DOHcode code)

function.name: doh_encode
function.parameter_list: (const char *host, DNStype dnstype, unsigned char *dnsp, /* buffer */ size_t len, /* buffer size */ size_t *olen)

function.name: doh_write_cb
function.parameter_list: (const void *contents, size_t size, size_t nmemb, void *userp)

unit.comment: /* called from multi.c when this DoH transfer is complete */

function.name: doh_done
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *doh, CURLcode result)

unit.cpp:define: #define ERROR_CHECK_SETOPT(x,y) \ do { \ result = curl_easy_setopt(doh, x, y); \ if(result && \ result != CURLE_NOT_BUILT_IN && \ result != CURLE_UNKNOWN_OPTION) \ goto error; \ } while(0)

function.name: dohprobe

unit.comment: /* * Curl_doh() resolves a name using DoH. It resolves a name and returns a * 'Curl_addrinfo *' with the address information. */

function.name: Curl_doh
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, const char *hostname, int port, int *waitp)

function.name: skipqname
function.parameter_list: (const unsigned char *doh, size_t dohlen, unsigned int *indexp)

function.name: get16bit
function.parameter_list: (const unsigned char *doh, int index)

function.name: get32bit
function.parameter_list: (const unsigned char *doh, int index)

function.name: store_a
function.parameter_list: (const unsigned char *doh, int index, struct dohentry *d)

function.name: store_aaaa
function.parameter_list: (const unsigned char *doh, int index, struct dohentry *d)

function.name: store_cname
function.parameter_list: (const unsigned char *doh, size_t dohlen, unsigned int index, struct dohentry *d)

function.name: rdata
function.parameter_list: (const unsigned char *doh, size_t dohlen, unsigned short rdlength, unsigned short type, int index, struct dohentry *d)

function.name: de_init
function.parameter_list: (struct dohentry *de)

function.name: doh_decode
function.parameter_list: (const unsigned char *doh, size_t dohlen, DNStype dnstype, struct dohentry *d)

function.name: showdoh
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, const struct dohentry *d)

unit.comment: /* * doh2ai() * * This function returns a pointer to the first element of a newly allocated * Curl_addrinfo struct linked list filled with the data from a set of DoH * lookups. Curl_addrinfo is meant to work like the addrinfo struct does for * a IPv6 stack, but usable also for IPv4, all hosts and environments. * * The memory allocated by this function *MUST* be free'd later on calling * Curl_freeaddrinfo(). For each successful call to this function there * must be an associated call later to Curl_freeaddrinfo(). */

function.name: doh2ai
function.parameter_list: (const struct dohentry *de, const char *hostname, int port, struct Curl_addrinfo **aip)

function.name: type2name
function.parameter_list: (DNStype dnstype)

function.name: de_cleanup
function.parameter_list: (struct dohentry *d)

function.name: Curl_doh_is_resolved
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, struct Curl_dns_entry **dnsp)
